---
title: "test_debt_viz_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_debt_viz_empire.py"
loc: 25
complexity: 1
logic_score: 6.97
style_score: 3.98
intel_score: 4.60
overall_score: 4.43
---

## Intent
The `test_debt_viz_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_debt_analyzer_files, test_debt_analyzer_logic. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_debt_analyzer_files, test_debt_analyzer_logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.debt_viz](file://src.tools.debt_viz)

### Exports
- `test_debt_analyzer_files`
- `test_debt_analyzer_logic`
